nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord God, ‘Because they say to you, “You are a devourer of men and have bereaved your nation of children,”

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God: Because they say to you, ‘You devour people, and you bereave your nation of children,’

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：因為人對你說：你是吞吃人的，又是使你的國民喪失子女的。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，‘虽然人们说你们吞吃以色列人、夺走他们的儿女。
